title: Saliva Dripping
content:
Me just finished watching the [iPhone Guided Tour][1] ... HOW MUCH IS THE TICKET TO SAN FRANCISCO? :P (No, I'm not serious.)

This thing is COOOOOL! Unfortunately, I'd have to wait until next year. Or maybe I should say "one more year" because no one said "the iPhone will come to Asia in January".

Right now, all I have to do is .. drool. huhuhuhuhu ...

[1]: http://www.apple.com/iphone/usingiphone/guidedtour.html
